title: The character set of the result of `NOT` is binary, which is different from MySQL
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

```
CREATE TABLE t1 (a INT, b VARCHAR(10)); INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (0, '0'); SELECT NOT a COLLATE utf8mb4_bin = b FROM t1;
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

```
mysql> CREATE TABLE t1 (a INT, b VARCHAR(10)); INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (0, '0'); SELECT NOT a COLLATE utf8mb4_bin = b FROM t1;
Query OK, 0 rows affected (0.07 sec)

Query OK, 1 row affected (0.01 sec)

+-------------------------------+
| NOT a COLLATE utf8mb4_bin = b |
+-------------------------------+
|                             0 |
+-------------------------------+
1 row in set (0.00 sec)
```

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

```
mysql> CREATE TABLE t1 (a INT, b VARCHAR(10)); INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (0, '0'); SELECT NOT a COLLATE utf8mb4_bin = b FROM t1;
Query OK, 0 rows affected (0.05 sec)

Query OK, 1 row affected (0.01 sec)

ERROR 1253 (42000): COLLATION 'utf8mb4_bin' is not valid for CHARACTER SET 'binary'
```

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
poc: CREATE TABLE t1 (a INT, b VARCHAR(10)); INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (0, '0'); SELECT NOT a COLLATE utf8mb4_bin = b FROM t1;
key_bug_features: NOT operation with binary character set collations
bug_feature_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (a INT, b VARCHAR(10), c CHAR(5), d VARBINARY(10));
SELECT NOT a COLLATE utf8mb4_bin = b FROM t1;
SELECT NOT (a COLLATE utf8mb4_bin) = c FROM t1;
SELECT (NOT a) COLLATE utf8mb4_bin = b FROM t1;
SELECT NOT a = b COLLATE utf8mb4_bin FROM t1;
SELECT NOT a COLLATE utf8mb4_bin = CAST(b AS CHAR) FROM t1;
SELECT NOT a COLLATE utf8mb4_bin = CAST(d AS CHAR) FROM t1;
SELECT NOT CAST(a AS CHAR) COLLATE utf8mb4_bin = b FROM t1;
SELECT NOT CAST(a AS CHAR) = b COLLATE utf8mb4_bin FROM t1;
SELECT NOT a = b FROM t1;
SELECT NOT (a = b COLLATE utf8mb4_bin) FROM t1;
SELECT NOT (CAST(a AS CHAR) COLLATE utf8mb4_bin = b) FROM t1;
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (x INT, y VARCHAR(20) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin, z BINARY(10));
SELECT NOT x COLLATE utf8mb4_bin = y FROM t2;
CREATE TABLE t3 (m INT NOT NULL, n VARCHAR(15) DEFAULT NULL);
